how_it_works: Each base class has 3 Ascendancy classes (except Scion: 1). Complete Labyrinth trials and run Normal/Cruel/Merciless/Eternal Lab to earn all 8 Ascendancy points. You can respec your Ascendancy for 20 Orbs of Regret.
respec_note: Respeccing Ascendancy costs 20 Orbs of Regret and grants 2 Refund Points per reset.
tips: Each Lab difficulty awards 2 Ascendancy points — run all 4 Labs per character for the full 8.
Ascendancy choice is the most impactful single decision for a build's viability.
Scion's Ascendant lets you borrow notable passives from other Ascendancies — extremely flexible for hybrid builds.

classes.name: Juggernaut
classes.playstyle: Unstoppable melee tank — high armour, stun immunity, slow but relentless.
key_notables: Unbreakable (armour mitigates all hits)
Unflinching (endurance charges on stun)
Unstoppable (cannot be slowed below base)
Unrelenting (endurance charges reduce damage)
classes.notes: The quintessential unkillable melee class. Trades damage ceiling for extreme survivability. Stun immunity makes dangerous map mods trivial.

classes.name: Berserker
classes.playstyle: Glass-cannon melee — trades life for massive damage bonuses via Rage and life cost.
key_notables: Rite of Ruin (Rage bonus doubled)
Crave the Slaughter (free Berserk)
Aspect of Carnage (+40% damage, take +10% damage)
War Bringer (warcries cost life, generate endurance charges)
classes.primary_defence: Life recovery on kill / High life pool
classes.notes: Aspect of Carnage is one of the highest flat damage bonuses in the game. Requires sustain — works best with strong life on hit or leech.

classes.name: Chieftain
classes.playstyle: Fire-focused melee/caster with strong totems and life/mana sustain via fire damage.
key_notables: Ngamahu (fire pen + life regen on kill)
Tawhoa (totems gain your buffs)
Ramako (sun's punishment — fire exposure)
Hinekora (death's fury — kill chain leech)
classes.primary_defence: Life regeneration + Totems as meat shields
classes.notes: Best Ascendancy for totem builds requiring fire conversion. Provides consistent fire resistance penetration and strong leech-based sustain.

classes.name: Deadeye
classes.playstyle: Fast, high-range projectile attacker — emphasises clear speed, pierce, and chain.
key_notables: Gathering Winds (Tailwind on kill — +10% action speed)
Focal Point (mark target takes extra damage)
Far Shot (damage increases with distance)
Ricochet (extra projectile + chain on kill)
classes.notes: The premier bow-attack Ascendancy for mapping. Tailwind stacks are extremely powerful for both clear speed and boss DPS. Far Shot rewards staying at maximum range.

classes.name: Raider
classes.playstyle: Frenzy-charge stacker — very high attack speed, Phasing, and on-kill bonuses.
key_notables: Way of the Poacher (Frenzy charges on kill)
Rapid Assault (Onslaught on kill)
Quartz Infusion (Phasing + flat dodge)
Avatar of the Veil (extra evasion, ele ailment immunity)
classes.notes: Flicker Strike requires Raider for reliable frenzy charge generation. Phasing is one of the best defensive bonuses for dodging telegraphed attacks.

classes.name: Pathfinder
classes.playstyle: Flask-focused — maximises flask uptime, effects, and gains powerful poison/damage from flasks.
key_notables: Nature's Reprisal (flask charges on kill)
Master Surgeon (flask charges on critical)
Nature's Adrenaline (full flasks on kill)
Master Alchemist (ailment immunity during flasks)
classes.notes: Best Ascendancy for poison-based builds and flask-dependent builds. Ailment immunity from flasks simplifies defensive requirements significantly.

classes.name: Necromancer
classes.playstyle: Summon-based caster — raises and buffs powerful minions, shares auras with minions.
key_notables: Commander of Darkness (auras affect minions, +elemental resists)
Bone Sculptor (spectres gain your charges)
Invoker (on kill effects trigger for minions)
Mindless Aggression (minions gain flat damage + attack/cast speed)
classes.primary_defence: Minions as damage sponges + Chaos res (CI or life)
classes.notes: The best Ascendancy for any minion build. Commune with minion AI — position minions well to avoid single-target targeting.

classes.name: Elementalist
classes.playstyle: Elemental damage amplifier — powerful golem buffs, ailment scaling, and elemental exposure.
key_notables: Liege of the Primordial (golem buffs doubled, extra golem slot)
Shaper of Storms (shock effect + guaranteed shock)
Mastermind of Discord (exposure stacking)
Paragon of Calamity (leech from ele hits)
classes.primary_defence: Energy Shield (most common) or Life with Chaos Inoculation
classes.notes: Golems from Liege of the Primordial can provide enormous damage bonuses. Shaper of Storms enables shock-stacking for any lightning or multi-element build.

classes.name: Occultist
classes.playstyle: Chaos damage and curse specialist — powerful ES recovery, curse proliferation, and Void damage.
key_notables: Malediction (-1 enemy curse limit raised)
Void Beacon (nearby enemies take increased chaos damage)
Profane Bloom (cursed enemies explode on kill)
Vile Bastion (ES regen per kill)
classes.notes: Profane Bloom explosions provide unparalleled mapping clear with cursed-enemy proliferation. Best Ascendancy for curse-stacking builds.

classes.name: Slayer
classes.playstyle: Powerful melee attacker — culling, leech bonuses, overkill mechanics, and bleed/physical damage.
key_notables: Headsman (culling strike + 20% overkill damage)
Brutal Fervour (leech cap doubled, leech continues during full life)
Impact (extra melee range)
Bane of Legends (kill pinnacle bosses 20% faster, gain soul eater on rare/unique kill)
classes.notes: Brutal Fervour makes leech mechanics extremely forgiving. Headsman's culling effectively gives a free 20% life bonus against bosses.

classes.name: Gladiator
classes.playstyle: Bleed and block specialist — maximises ailment damage, attack block, and bleed explosions.
key_notables: Gratuitous Violence (bleeding enemies explode on kill)
Outmatch and Outlast (frenzy/endurance charges + dual wield/shield bonuses)
Blood in the Eyes (blinds enemies on bleed)
Painforged (chance to bleed on block, max block cap raised)
classes.notes: Gratuitous Violence is the best map-clear mechanic for bleed builds. Block + Dodge makes Gladiator one of the tankiest Ascendancies when correctly built.

classes.name: Champion
classes.playstyle: Balanced melee fighter — strong Fortify, Intimidation, taunt mechanics, and high armour.
key_notables: Inspirational (banner bonuses doubled + nearby allies get bonuses)
Master of Metal (Impale lasts longer, impale stacks doubled)
Conqueror (taunt on hit, taunted enemies deal reduced damage)
Unstoppable Hero (permanent Fortify + max fortify stacks doubled)
classes.notes: Unstoppable Hero permanent Fortify is an enormous quality-of-life improvement. Master of Metal makes Impale the primary damage source.

classes.name: Inquisitor
classes.playstyle: Critical-strike caster — ignores elemental resistance with Inevitable Judgement, scales with crits.
key_notables: Inevitable Judgement (crits ignore ele resists)
Righteous Providence (high crit multi for spells)
Augury of Penitence (enemies take extra ele damage)
Pious Path (consecrated ground bonuses + immune to crit reduction)
classes.primary_defence: Life or Energy Shield depending on build
classes.notes: Inevitable Judgement is the reason most critical-strike elemental builds choose Inquisitor — resistance ignore is worth more than raw damage multipliers at high resistance targets.

classes.name: Hierophant
classes.playstyle: Totem and mana specialist — up to 4 totems, mana reservation reduction, arcane surge buffs.
key_notables: Ritual of Awakening (3rd totem + mana regen)
Pursuit of Faith (4th totem + totem damage/placement speed)
Sanctuary of Thought (mana reservation efficiency)
Divine Guidance (massive mana pool + ES from mana)
classes.primary_defence: Energy Shield from mana (with Divine Guidance) or Life
classes.notes: 4 totems with Pursuit of Faith is the strongest totem Ascendancy. Divine Guidance enables ES builds without traditional ES gear by converting mana to ES.

classes.name: Guardian
classes.playstyle: Support and aura specialist — maximum aura reservation efficiency, sharing charges, powerful buffs to allies.
key_notables: Radiate (auras affect nearby allies without the gem)
Harmony of Purpose (all allies gain charges on kill)
Unwavering Faith (aura effect + mana reservation for warcries)
Time of Need (aura reservation reduced, periodic heals)
classes.primary_defence: Energy Shield or Life + strong aura buffs
classes.notes: Best Ascendancy for group play. Radiate's free aura-sharing makes Guardian mandatory in serious party content. Solo: still strong for aura-stacking builds.

classes.name: Assassin
classes.playstyle: Critical strike poison specialist — high crit chance, powerful poison from crits, fast assassin gameplay.
key_notables: Noxious Strike (poison on crit, extra poison chance)
Deadly Infusion (crit multi per poison on enemy)
Mistwalker (Elusive on kill, attack/cast speed)
Ambush and Assassinate (crit multiplier vs full life/low life enemies)
classes.notes: Deadly Infusion makes Assassin the premier poison Ascendancy when combined with Mistwalker's Elusive for defence. Best for attack-based poison.

classes.name: Saboteur
classes.playstyle: Trap and mine specialist — maximum trap/mine damage, automatic trigger chains, and AOE ignite.
key_notables: Born in the Shadows (blind enemies near traps/mines)
Bomb Specialist (trap throws 1 additional mine-adjacent)
Pyromaniac (life/mana on trap trigger, fire res + extra ignite)
Explosives Expert (trap/mine damage + critical)
classes.primary_defence: Evasion + traps keep enemies at range
classes.notes: Saboteur is the only Ascendancy that meaningfully empowers Trap and Mine skills. Traps are one of the safest playstyles as they deal damage from a distance.

classes.name: Trickster
classes.playstyle: Fast ES/Dodge caster or attacker — high ES, dodge, and on-kill recovery mechanics.
key_notables: Ghost Dance (ES gained on dodge + Elusive stacks)
Escape Artist (ES from evasion, evasion from ES)
Harness the Void (chaos damage bonus scaling with ES/life)
Swift Killer (frenzy charges on kill, charges on dodge)
classes.notes: One of the best defensive Ascendancies — Escape Artist synergy with Ghost Dance gives high ES and dodge simultaneously. Best for CI or hybrid ES/life builds.

classes.name: Ascendant
classes.playstyle: Hybrid flexible archetype — borrows 2 Ascendancy notable-like passives from other Ascendancies.
key_notables: Any 2 Ascendancy sub-class nodes (e.g. Slayer + Champion, Necromancer + Guardian, etc.)
Pathfinder start (flask effect)
Ranger start (movement speed)
Juggernaut start (endurance charge generation)
classes.notes: Scion starts near the centre of the tree — exceptional for builds needing nodes from multiple tree areas. Ascendant gives less power than a dedicated Ascendancy but unmatched flexibility.
